backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Trusted Cars backend, implementing admin-controlled car management (add, update, delete, list) and booking management, with user profile storage and role-based access control via AccessControl and MixinAuthorization mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two completed features: removing the URL-token requirement from the admin login page, and ensuring the admin actor initializes correctly using only backend credentials without a URL-based token.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON map of frontend source file paths to short summaries describing each file's purpose and notable recent changes, serving as a quick reference for the frontend codebase.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS entry point that imports Tailwind base/components/utilities and defines CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens in both light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA, setting the page title to 'Trusted Cars' and mounting the app at the `#root` div via the `main.tsx` module entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that defines the TanStack Router route tree, separating public routes (home, cars, car detail, booking) under a layout with Header/Footer from admin routes (login, dashboard) under a plain admin layout.
frontend/src/components/admin/BookingMan: Admin table component that displays test drive bookings with status update dropdowns, loading skeletons, and a CSV export feature.
frontend/src/components/admin/CarForm.ts: Admin dialog form for adding or editing a car listing, with fields for all car attributes, auto-generated slugs, dynamic image URL inputs, and validation.
frontend/src/components/admin/CarManagem: Admin table component that displays all cars with options to edit, delete, and mark as sold, using React Query mutations and skeleton loading states.
frontend/src/components/CarCard.tsx: Reusable card component for displaying a car listing with image, status/featured badges, specs grid (year, km, fuel, transmission), formatted price/EMI, and a 'View Details' navigation button.
frontend/src/components/EnquiryModal.tsx: Modal dialog for car enquiries that collects the user's name and phone number with validation, shows a success confirmation on submit, and resets state on close.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with brand logos, quick navigation links, and contact information (address, phone, email) for Trusted Cars dealership in Karol Bagh, Delhi.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Renders a fixed responsive header with dual brand logos, desktop/mobile navigation links, a phone call button, and scroll-aware shadow styling.
frontend/src/components/ImageGallerySlid: A carousel image gallery component with prev/next navigation, thumbnail strip, image counter, and a fullscreen lightbox overlay.
frontend/src/components/WhatsAppButton.t: Renders a fixed floating WhatsApp chat button linking to the dealership's WhatsApp number.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, initializing it with the user's Internet Identity or anonymously, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminActor.ts: React hook that creates a dedicated admin backend actor when the user is marked as admin in localStorage, with helpers to store and clear the admin token in session storage.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for car and booking data fetching and mutations, including admin authentication logic with hardcoded credentials and admin actor creation helpers.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind CSS layers, defines CSS custom properties for the brand color system (white/red/black), and adds utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with TanStack QueryClientProvider and the InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminDashboardP: Admin dashboard page with tabbed navigation for car management and bookings, plus a modal form for adding new cars. Includes a logout button that clears local storage and redirects to the login page.
Admin login page with email/password form that calls the login mutation and redirects to the dashboard on success. Displays inline error messages and supports password visibility toggle.
frontend/src/pages/BookTestDrivePage.tsx: Page component with a form for booking a test drive, supporting car pre-selection via URL params, client-side validation, and a success confirmation screen after submission.
frontend/src/pages/CarDetailPage.tsx: Displays a detailed view of a single car fetched by slug, including an image gallery, specs, pricing, and an enquiry modal. Also dynamically updates the page title and meta description for SEO.
frontend/src/pages/CarsPage.tsx: Renders a filterable car listing page with sidebar filters for budget, brand, fuel type, transmission, and year. Filters are applied client-side against the full car list fetched via a query hook.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Renders the public-facing home page with a hero section, featured cars carousel, 'Why Choose Us' highlights, and customer reviews. Uses navigation hooks to link to the cars and test-drive booking pages.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for reading URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routes, with helpers to persist values in sessionStorage and clean sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, defining dark mode, content paths, custom brand colors (red/black/white), fonts (Inter, Poppins), shadows, border radii, and animations using typography, container-queries, and tailwindcss-animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file for Trusted Cars dealership website, documenting architectural decisions, existing features, known issues (silent Add Car failure), and versioned feature/requirement metadata for a React frontend with admin panel.
